kv.memory.code-review-gate-every-logical: Code review gate: every logical chunk of code generated or modified must be run through /codereview 3 times before proceeding. This is a hard rule in both AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md.
kv.memory.codereview-findings-must-be-fi: Codereview findings must be filed as beads issues tagged codereview. Never discard or ignore review findings — they get tracked.
